title: CubeFS Volume
description: Schema for CubeFS volume configuration and status. Volumes are the top-level storage namespaces in CubeFS that can be accessed via POSIX, HDFS, or S3-compatible interfaces. Each volume owns a set of data partitions and metadata partitions distributed across the cluster.

name.description: Unique name identifying the volume within the CubeFS cluster. Also used as the S3 bucket name.

owner.description: User ID that owns this volume. The owner has full control permissions.

capacity.description: Total storage capacity allocated to this volume in gigabytes.

replicaNum.description: Replication factor for data partitions. Replicated volumes only. 3 is the standard for high availability.

volType.description: Volume type. 0 for replicated volumes; 1 for erasure-coded (EC) volumes.

mpCount.description: Initial number of metadata partitions to create. Each metadata partition stores inode and directory entry data.

dpCount.description: Initial number of data partitions to create. Data partitions store the actual file data blocks.

followerRead.description: Whether follower replicas can serve read requests. Enabling this improves read throughput at the cost of potentially serving slightly stale data.

enablePosixAcl.description: Whether POSIX access control lists are enabled on this volume. Required for multi-user POSIX permission support.

qosEnable.description: Whether quality of service throttling is enabled on this volume to limit bandwidth and IOPS.

status.description: Current volume status. 0 means normal and active; 1 means marked for deletion.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the volume was created.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the volume's purpose.

dataPartitions.description: List of data partitions belonging to this volume.

metaPartitions.description: List of metadata partitions belonging to this volume.

totalSize.description: Total allocated storage capacity in bytes.

DataPartition.description: A data partition within a CubeFS volume that stores actual file data blocks.

partitionID.description: Unique identifier for this data partition.

status.description: Partition status. 1 is read-write; 2 is read-only; 3 is unavailable.

replicaNum.description: Number of replicas for this partition.

hosts.description: List of data node addresses hosting replicas of this partition.

items.description: Data node address in host:port format.

isRecover.description: Whether this partition is currently in a recovery state.

total.description: Total capacity of this partition in bytes.

used.description: Used capacity of this partition in bytes.

path.description: Disk path on the data node where this partition's data is stored.

MetaPartition.description: A metadata partition within a CubeFS volume that stores inode and directory entry data.

partitionID.description: Unique identifier for this metadata partition.

start.description: Start of the inode number range managed by this partition.

end.description: End of the inode number range managed by this partition.

inodeCount.description: Current number of inodes stored in this partition.

maxInodeID.description: The highest inode ID currently allocated in this partition.

isRecover.description: Whether this metadata partition is currently recovering.

hosts.description: List of metadata node addresses hosting this partition.

items.description: Metadata node address in host:port format.

leader.description: Address of the current raft leader for this partition.

User.description: A CubeFS user account with S3 credentials and volume ownership.

user_id.description: Unique user identifier within the CubeFS cluster.

access_key.description: S3-compatible access key for authenticating object storage requests.

secret_key.description: S3-compatible secret key for signing object storage requests.

own_vols.description: List of volume names that this user owns.

authorized_vols.description: Map of volume names to access permission levels granted to this user.

user_type.description: User type. 0 for normal user; 1 for admin user with cluster-wide privileges.

create_time.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

DataNode.description: A CubeFS data node that stores data partition replicas.

addr.description: Network address of the data node in host:port format.

status.description: Whether this node is currently active and healthy.

isWritable.description: Whether this node can accept new data partition allocations.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier assigned to this node by the Master.

totalWeight.description: Total storage capacity of this node in bytes.

usedWeight.description: Used storage on this node in bytes.

availableSpace.description: Available storage remaining on this node in bytes.

dataPartitionCount.description: Number of data partitions currently hosted on this node.

MetaNode.description: A CubeFS metadata node that stores metadata partition data.

addr.description: Network address of the metadata node in host:port format.

status.description: Whether this node is currently active and healthy.

isWritable.description: Whether this node can accept new metadata partition allocations.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier assigned to this node by the Master.

totalWeight.description: Total memory or storage capacity of this node in bytes.

usedWeight.description: Used memory or storage on this node in bytes.

metaPartitionCount.description: Number of metadata partitions currently hosted on this node.
